case_title: CARROLL AVENUE SENIOR HOMES, LP VS. JAMES RICH ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARROLL AVENUE SENIOR HOMES, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICH, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1751 CARROLL AVENUE #209, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94124, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARROLL AVENUE SENIOR HOMES, LP AS TO DEFENDANT RICH, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARROLL AVENUE SENIOR HOMES, LP
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARROLL AVENUE SENIOR HOMES, LP
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARROLL AVENUE SENIOR HOMES, LP AS TO DEFENDANT RICH, JAMES
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $430.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $200.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RICH, JAMES
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT RICH, JAMES
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (UNLAWFUL DETAINER-CODE CIVIL PROC., 585 (D)) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARROLL AVENUE SENIOR HOMES, LP
DECLARATION OF STEPHANIE BURCH IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARROLL AVENUE SENIOR HOMES, LP

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARROLL AVENUE SENIOR HOMES, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICH, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT-ISSUE $430.00 COSTS, $587.60 HOLDOVER CHARGES, $200.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $817.60, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) D501
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARROLL AVENUE SENIOR HOMES, LP SERVED FEB-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RICH, JAMES
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE 10-DAY NOTICE TO QUIT -NUISANCE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARROLL AVENUE SENIOR HOMES, LP
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RICH, JAMES
